message.content: {"problems":[{"number":1,"points":2,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"$1\\ 1\\\\4\\ 2$의 값은?","choices":["1 V3 3 3 3 V3 5 9","7","9","11 13 5 15","",""]},{"number":2,"points":2,"problem_type":"short_answer","question":"함수 $f(x) = 3x^3 + 4x + 1$에 대하여 $\\lim_{h \\to 0} \\frac{f(1+h)-f(1)}{h}$의 값은?","choices":[]},{"number":3,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"수열 $\\{a_n\\}$에 대하여 $(2a_k - k) = 0$일 때, $E a_k$의 값은? $k=1$ $k=1$","choices":["1","2","3","4","5"]},{"number":4,"points":3,"problem_type":"multiple_choice","question":"이 실수 전체의 집합에서 연속일 때, 상수 $a$의 값은?","choices":["1","2","3","4","5"]}]}
